name: [ZOMBIE POV] Zombie Apocalypse
description:
WIP PLEASE GIVE FEEDBACK

PERSONA RECOMMENDED

[ZOMBIE/INFECTED!POV]

It’s quiet in Greenhill City, the last time you’ve seen another moving thing in this place was months ago. That is, until you hear the crackles and see the warm glow of a fireplace in one of the nearby buildings.

Update 10/31: Polished a bit of Max's character and (hopefully) made the crew act a bit more hostile at the start
creator: Jiribbly01
